queue.title: Auto-slim gate for SESSION_*.md files
queue.description: (added ~s1872): The token-budget-estimator already detects over-budget files and auto-creates wq items. Add a pre-commit hook check that warns (non-blocking) when any SESSION_*.md edit pushes a file over the 3000-token threshold, catching bloat at commit time rather than waiting for the next audit cycle.

queue.title: Investigate s1874 incomplete session note and zero-formulaic streak break
queue.description: (from audit A#217): E#224 (s1874) produced incomplete session note ('Let me move to Phase 1 and then Phase 2 engagement') instead of proper completion summary. This broke the 50-session zero-formulaic streak. Investigate: was this a cost-cap truncation, early termination, or quality failure? If cost-cap, check whether e-cost-cap.mjs fired before note generation completed. Consider adding a guard that ensures session note is generated before cost-cap terminates.

outcome.note: Root cause: 10-summarize.sh not deleted when absorbed into 10-session-logging.sh (R#334/s1868). Parallel hook execution caused .summary file race condition — awk extraction read truncated file, fell back to Feed section. Fix: deleted residual 10-summarize.sh, hardened note-fallback.mjs with preamble detection, fixed s1874 history entry retroactively.
